caption:
Kimi K3 has temporarily suspended new subscriptions due to overwhelming demand, leading to a strain on its GPU computing resources.

Chinese-made inference chips, such as those from Huawei, are expected to see increased demand as a result of these capacity pressures. Inference capability is now a key limiting factor for Kimi K3’s continued growth.

To manage resources, Kimi K3 will prioritize computing power for existing subscribers. The current customer base will not be affected by the pause.

The company plans to expand its capacity and reopen subscriptions in phases. Future membership will be divided into two plans: one for general use and another dedicated to coding-related workloads. This adjustment is designed to align computing resources more effectively.
